projectDescription: A type-safe TypeScript library implementing the Criteria Pattern for building and executing dynamic MongoDB queries following DDD and Clean Architecture principles.
keyFeatures: Type-safe Criteria Pattern for dynamic MongoDB query construction
12 filter operators: EQUAL, NOT_EQUAL, GT, GTE, LT, LTE, BETWEEN, CONTAINS, NOT_CONTAINS, OR, IN, NOT_IN
Abstract MongoRepository base class with built-in pagination, upsert, delete, and criteria-based listing
MongoTransaction support for atomic multi-repository writes
Dual CJS and ESM builds with full TypeScript type declarations
Lazy index registration via ensureIndexes hook in repositories
MongoCriteriaConverter for translating Criteria objects into native MongoDB query objects
CLI wrapper (ts-mongo) for running migrate-mongo database migrations
Value object primitives: ValueObject, StringValueObject, EnumValueObject, AggregateRoot
publicApiSurface: ts-mongo CLI (migrate:create, migrate:up, migrate:down, migrate:status, migrate:init)
